# Retro retires entities from the star chart.

# Setup
exec orbiter galaxy add acme-corp
exec orbiter planet add payments-api --galaxy acme-corp

# Retro a leaf planet — plan shows it, execution removes it
exec orbiter retro payments-api --yes
stdout 'payments-api'
stdout 'retire|retired'

# Surveying a retired entity fails
! exec orbiter survey payments-api
stderr 'not found|no target'

# Retro the galaxy (now a leaf — its only planet was just retired)
exec orbiter retro acme-corp --yes
stdout 'acme-corp'

! exec orbiter survey acme-corp
stderr 'not found|no target'

# Non-leaf hierarchy: galaxy with live children retires cleanly (cascade, leaf-first)
exec orbiter galaxy add bigcorp
exec orbiter planet add billing --galaxy bigcorp
exec orbiter retro bigcorp --yes
stdout 'bigcorp'

! exec orbiter survey bigcorp
stderr 'not found|no target'

! exec orbiter survey billing
stderr 'not found|no target'
